high_priority_mismatches.recommendation: Move Profile out of primary bottom navigation and add Scan as the center primary action.

high_priority_mismatches.current_issue: Web Dex is table-like and does not match the app's progress-first species-card model.
high_priority_mismatches.recommendation: Redesign Dex landing with app-style progress hero and species tiles.

high_priority_mismatches.current_issue: Web Sets page feels like a generic directory rather than the app discovery surface.
high_priority_mismatches.recommendation: Rebuild Sets around app-style discovery, filters, and set tiles.

high_priority_mismatches.current_issue: Diagnostic identity details are too visually prominent for the normal collector flow.
high_priority_mismatches.recommendation: Keep diagnostics available but make image, card name, set, finish, value, and ownership primary.

high_priority_mismatches.current_issue: Dark mode relies on broad overrides and can produce inconsistent surfaces.
high_priority_mismatches.recommendation: Move pages to shared tokenized surface primitives.

recommended_next_step: Implement web shell parity and shared visual primitives before redesigning individual pages.
